zh.lifeSummary: 當Olive Hubbard於1487年2月22日出生在英國艾可凱爾維頓 哈契時，她的父親Samuel Hubbard20歲，母親Katherine Wright18歲。她於1508年3月17日與Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年6月22日享年73歲，埋葬在英國艾可凱爾維頓 哈契。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olive Hubbard于1487年2月22日出生在英国艾可凱爾維頓 哈契时，她的父亲Samuel Hubbard20岁，母亲Katherine Wright18岁。她于1508年3月17日与Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年6月22日享年73岁，埋葬在英国艾可凱爾維頓 哈契。

nameMeanings.name: Hubbard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Norman French personal name Hubert (ancient Germanic Hugibert, composed of elements meaning ‘mind, spirit’ and ‘bright’).

variants.name: Hubert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand, Normand, Olivier, Adlore, Alphonse, Andre, Benoit, Camil, Camille, Fernand.

German, Dutch, English, French, Walloon, Breton, Polish, Czech, Slovak, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was borne by an 8th-century Christian saint, bishop of Maastricht, who was adopted as the patron of hunters, and helped to increase the popularity of the personal name, especially in the Low Countries.

History: Jean-François-Barthélemi Hubert from Granville in Manche, France, married Félicité Arsenault in Havre-Aubert, QC, in 1801. Nicolas Hubert dit Lacroix from France married Marguerite Landreau in France c. 1653, died in Montreal, QC, in 1687. René Hubert from Paris, France, married Françoise (de) Lacroix in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. Pierre-Paul Hébert/Hubert from France married Suzanne Laporte in QC c. 1716. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Hobart
meanings: English: probably a variant of Hubbard , though Middle English Hobert and Hoberd could represent Anglo-Norman French forms of Osbert, with loss of -s-. Compare Opie , which was a pet form of Osbert, and Hobby , which might sometimes have been as well.

nameMeanings.name: Olive
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval given name, Oliff(e), derived via French from the Late Latin name Oliva, which was borne by two obscure early saints. It in turn is derived from the Latin name for the olive tree, and was no doubt adopted at first because of the associations of the olive tree with peaceful productivity and fruitfulness; the olive branch has been a symbol of peace since biblical times. Like many names denoting plants and flowers, it was particularly popular in the early decades of the 20th century. See also Olivia .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Olive Hubbard was born on 22 February 1487, in Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, England, her father, Samuel Hubbard, was 20 and her mother, Katherine Wright, was 18. She married Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald on 17 March 1508. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 22 June 1560, at the age of 73, and was buried in Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olive Hubbard est née le 22 février 1487, à Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Samuel Hubbard, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Katherine Wright, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald le 17 mars 1508. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1560, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olive Hubbard am 22. Februar 1487 in Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Samuel Hubbard 20 und ihre Mutter Katherine Wright 18. Sie hat am 17. März 1508 Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1560 im Alter von 73 Jahren und wurde in Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olive Hubbard è nata il il 22 febbraio 1487 nel Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, England, sua padre, Samuel Hubbard, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Katherine Wright, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald il 17 marzo 1508. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 giugno 1560, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Olive Hubbard(이)가 1487년 2월 22일 영국 에세스 켈브던 해트치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Hubbard(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Wright(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1508년 3월 17일 Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 6월 22일 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 켈브던 해트치에 묻혔다.

pt.22 February 1487–22 June 1560: 22 de fevereiro de 1487–22 de junho de 1560
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olive Hubbard nasceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1487, em Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Hubbard, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Wright, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald em 17 de março de 1508. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1560, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olive Hubbard родилась 22 февраля 1487 г. в местности келведон хач, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Samuel Hubbard было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Wright, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald 17 марта 1508 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 22 июня 1560 г. в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности келведон хач, эссекс, Англия.

es.22 February 1487–22 June 1560: 22 de febrero de 1487–22 de junio de 1560
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olive Hubbard nació el 22 de febrero de 1487, en Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Samuel Hubbard, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Katherine Wright, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir John Wright, Knight of South Weald el 17 de marzo de 1508. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de junio de 1560, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Kelvedon Hatch, Essex, Inglaterra.
